title: lonchophaca macra
intro: Lonchophaca macra, also known as Kowhai or New Zealand Kowhai, is a flowering tree native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lonchophaca macra include reducing fever, improving digestion, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lonchophaca macra can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
